meta.title: Carsablanca — Your car's true price
meta.description: Carsablanca computes what your next car will really cost you each month in Morocco: financing or murabaha, insurance, fuel, maintenance — new or used.

hero.kicker: The operating system for car buying in Morocco
hero.h1line2: Not the one in the listing.
hero.sub: Carsablanca computes what your next car will really cost you each month — financing or murabaha, insurance, fuel, maintenance — and tells you what your budget can actually buy, new or used.

receipt.footnote: Example: 30% down, city driving in Casablanca. Dated, sourced estimates.

items: A cited source on every number

steps.title: Your budget
steps.body: Cash or monthly. Classic loan, lease-to-own, or murabaha — you pick what works for you.

steps.title: Your needs
steps.body: Family, commute, mileage, fuel. Sixty seconds of simple questions.

steps.title: Your shortlist
steps.body: Cars ranked by true monthly cost, new and used compared honestly.

costs.title: Six costs. None forgotten.
costs.sub: The purchase price is only the start of the story. Here's what Carsablanca counts for you.

items.title: Financing
items.body: Classic loan, lease-to-own, and murabaha compared on total cost — not just the monthly payment.

items.title: Insurance
items.body: Liability or full coverage, estimated from fiscal horsepower and vehicle value.

items.title: Fuel
items.body: Your real mileage, the model's consumption, today's pump prices.

items.title: Maintenance
items.body: Real costs by model and age — oil changes, parts, labor.

items.title: Reliability
items.body: Each model's known failures, at what mileage, and what they cost.

items.title: Resale
items.body: Depreciation — the cost nobody shows you, often the biggest of all.

vs.title: 169,900 MAD: new Sandero or 2019 Golf?

newCol.title: New
points: But depreciation hits hard the first 3 years

usedCol.title: Used
points: More car for the same budget
Someone else already paid the depreciation
But maintenance, reliability and risk to price in

vs.tagline: Carsablanca does the math, not the gamble.

items.title: Listing checks
items.body: Paste a used-car listing, get a report: fair price, what to inspect, questions to ask.

items.title: Paperwork without stress
items.body: Registration card, road tax, technical inspection — guided steps and timely reminders.

items.title: Real quotes
items.body: Financing and insurance offers from real partners, compared straight.

footer.disclaimer: Figures shown are indicative estimates based on dated, sourced public data. They are neither commercial offers nor financial advice. Always verify before you buy.

stub.title: The decision engine is coming
stub.body: This is exactly what we're building right now: budget, needs, and a shortlist ranked by true monthly cost. The landing page sets the tone — the engine follows.
